member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.ComosSystemTypes
member.summary: Enum ComosSystemTypes see original ComosSystemTypes enum in Interup.Plt.dll

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.CDeviceConstants
member.summary: CDeviceConstants see original CDeviceConstants in Interup.Plt.dll

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.ImageType
member.summary: Describes the type of an image.

member.name: F:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.ImageType.Base64
member.summary: The image is a base64 encoded string.

member.name: F:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.ImageType.SVG
member.summary: The image is a full path to a SVG icon.

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.ServiceUser
member.summary: Service user for the web client.

member.name: P:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.Setting.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets a localizable display name

member.name: P:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.Setting.ValueOptionsId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier for avaialable value options

member.name: P:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.Setting.FilterSettings
member.summary: gets or sets settings based on app filters

member.name: P:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Contracts.Setting.SubSettings
member.summary: gets or sets settings associated with this setting.

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDiscoveryController
member.summary: Provides discovery service endpoints for public web apis

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDiscoveryController.GetDiscoveries
member.summary: Provides discovery services for public apis

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController
member.summary: Provides document web api services for web client

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.GetDocument(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Downloads a document based on document Id
member.remarks:
The supplied document ID can refer to documents of various types:
a plain COMOS document (including reports)
a DDM (= versioned) document (in this case the latest version will be retrieved)
a particular version of a DDM (= versioned) document
a revision (in this case the parameter "docid" technically refers to COMOS device)
a redlining document of a revision
an additional document of a revision
member.param: Export type. At the moment the types 'report2pdf' and 'report2excel' are supported. Note that docid must refer to a report in this case.
member.returns: The document contents as a download.
member.response: The document was found and the export was created
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.GetDocumentRevisions(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the revisons of a document
member.response: If the revision info on the document was found.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.AcceptRevisionStep(System.String,System.String,System.String,Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.RevisionStep,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs revision step on given revision.
member.returns: A status code indicating whether the step was executed successfully
member.response: If the revision step was performed.
If the revision could not be performed

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.AddDocumentToObject(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Upload a document under a device/document as a copy.
member.remarks: The uploaded document can be in the form of pdf, word document etc.
member.response: If the document was created successfully.
If one of the parameters is invalid

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.EStampDocument(System.String)
member.response: If the document could be estamped
If one of the parameters is invalid
If the related document could not be found

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.PostDocumentCheckout(System.String,System.String,System.String,Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.DocumentComment,System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: Note that this operation does not do a download - it must be done by calling the route "... {projid}/documents/{docid}".
member.response: If document is successfully checked out.
If the invalid parameters are provided.
For invalid session or missing license
For not found or missing rights or if the resources could not be found.
For unexpected error

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.PostDocumentUndoCheckout(System.String,System.String,System.String,Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.DocumentComment,System.String,System.String)
member.response: If document is successfully undo check out.
If the invalid parameters are provided.
For invalid session or missing license
For not found or missing rights or if the resources could not be found.
For unexpected error

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.PostDocumentRevisionRedlining(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Posts a new redlining document for a specific revision.
member.response: If redlining document is successfully added.
If the invalid parameters are provided.
For invalid session or missing license
For not found or missing rights or if the resources could not be found.
For unexpected error

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.PostDocumentCheckin(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.remarks:
This API can do a first checkin or a consecutive checkin.
Check if the document can be checked in , eg Check if the document is checked out .
Checks for Mandatory Attributes
Check in the document
The API expects multi-part form data that consists of
Sample format 1. values [{ "NestedName":"string", //Required "Value":"string", "SIValue":"double", "LinkObject":{ "UID":"string", "ProjectUID":"string", "OverlayUID":"string" }, "XValues":[{ "Index":"int", "XValue":"string", "SIXValue":"double" }] }] 2. comment "comment":"string" 3. file : The file to be checked in
member.param: Can be a Document Placeholder UID or a Document UID
member.response: If check-in is successful.
If invalid parameters are provided.
For invalid session or missing license
For not found or missing rights or if the resources could not be found.
For unexpected error

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.PostCreateDocumentRevision(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.response: If the revision was posted successfully.
If the referenced dicument could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiDocumentsController.ReplaceDocument(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces an existing document under an object with a new one while keeping the UID. Only for documents without version management (non DDMS)
member.remarks: The uploaded document will replace the existing document identified by docid. The request should be sent as multipart/form-data with the file content.
member.returns: 204 No Content if successful, error otherwise.
member.response: If replacement was successful.
If invalid parameters are provided.
For invalid session or missing license
For not found or missing rights or if the resources could not be found.
For unexpected error

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController
member.summary: Provies projects services to web client

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetProjects(System.String,System.String)
member.response: If the projects could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetWorkingOverlays(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a collection of working overlays
member.response: If the working layers could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.CreateWorkingOverlay(System.String,System.String,Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.WorkingOverlayPost)
member.response: If the working layer was created successfully.
If the working layer could not be created because of invalid parameters
If the resources could not be found.

members.member:
Gets an object
Object is fetched based on the object Id.
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - Default set of fields for the object.
"*" - Full set of fields for the object.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: Fields will be filtered out in case they are not applicable for the given object type. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Fields supported by Objects based on the object type:
Object Type Default Fields All Fields
CDevice Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Class,XObjExist Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,OwnLabel
Device Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Location,Unit Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,CDevice,BackPointerDocObjs,Documents,Devices,Location,Unit,Implementation,BackPointerDevicesWithImplementation,OwnLabel
Document Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Description2,Description3,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType,BackPointerDocumentsWithOrgDocument,IsDdmDocument,IsDocumentExportable,DocumentExtension,DocumentHasReleaseRevision,OwnLabel,Documents,Devices,DocObjs
Project Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,StandardTables,OwnStandardTables,Devices
DocObj Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Reference,Reference2 Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Reference,Reference2
Other Types Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist
Database Id Project Id Object Id Working Overlay Id Language Id Fields to reduce the retrieved properties to Object details If the object could be fetched. If the resources could not be found. If the request is invalid. GET /api/webview/v1/dbs/{dbid}/projects/{projid}/objects/{objid}

Gets the object properties
Object is fetched based on the object's path full name.
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - Default set of fields for the object.
"*" - Full set of fields for the object.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields separated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: Fields will be filtered out in case they are not applicable for the given object type. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Fields supported by Objects based on the object type:
Object Type Default Fields All Fields
CDevice Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Class,XObjExist Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,OwnLabel
Device Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Location,Unit Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,CDevice,BackPointerDocObjs,Documents,Devices,Location,Unit,Implementation,BackPointerDevicesWithImplementation,OwnLabel
Document Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Description2,Description3,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType,BackPointerDocumentsWithOrgDocument,IsDdmDocument,IsDocumentExportable,DocumentExtension,DocumentHasReleaseRevision,OwnLabel,Documents,Devices
Other Types Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist
Database Id Project Id Path full name Working Overlay Id Language Id Fields to reduce the retrieved properties to Object details If the object properties could be fetched. If the resources could not be found. If the request is invalid. GET /api/webview/v1/dbs/{dbid}/projects/{projid}/object

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetComosObjects(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.ComosUIDObject},System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets up to 1000 COMOS objects with given fields and specification information.
member.remarks:
Objects is fetched based on an array of object UIDs.
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - Default set of fields for the object.
"*" - Full set of fields for the object.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note:
Fields will be filtered out in case they are not applicable for the given object type. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
nested_names and recursion_depth are applicable for 'Specifications' field which needs to be explicitly passed or will be available with '*'.
Fields supported by Objects based on the object type:
nested_names include the specification nested names. These can include the hierarchical child specifications as well. recursion_depth can have the following values:
-1 : will fetch all the specification children until the maximum depth.
0 (default) : will fetch immediate object specifications.
2/3/4...etc : will fetch all the specification children until the specified recursion depth.
Object Type Default Fields All Fields
CDevice Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Class,XObjExist Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,OwnLabel,Specifications
Device Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Location,Unit Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,CDevice,BackPointerDocObjs,Documents,Devices,Location,Unit,Implementation,BackPointerDevicesWithImplementation,OwnLabel,Specifications
Document Name,Description,Description2,Description3,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType,BackPointerDocumentsWithOrgDocument,IsDdmDocument,IsDocumentExportable,DocumentExtension,DocumentHasReleaseRevision,OwnLabel,Documents,Devices,Specifications,CObject
DocObj Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Reference,Reference2 Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Reference,Reference2
Other Types Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Specifications
member.param: Filter to get only a part of the whole object list
Fields to reduce the retrieved properties to
Specification nested names that should be returned additionally to the fields
Specifications children to be fetch until what depth.
member.returns: Array of object details with given fields and nested names
member.response: If the objects could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.
If the request is invalid.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetProjectLanguages(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a collection of supported languages
member.response: If the languages could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetProjectDefaultLanguage(System.String,System.String)
member.response: If the project language could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetSpecifications(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the specifications for an object
member.remarks:
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - The specifications will have "Name,Description" fields.
"*" - The specifications will have "NestedName,Description,Value,DisplayValue,LValue,SIValue,ControlType,Unit,RangeType,Type,TabIndex,PhysUnitLabel,Precision,Length,Count,LinkObject,StandardTable,XValues" fields.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: Fields will be filtered out in case they are not a part of the specifications. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
nested_names include the specification nested names. These can include the hierarchical child specifications as well. recursion_depth can have the following values:
-1 : will fetch all the specification children until the maximum depth.
0 (default) : will fetch immediate object specifications.
2/3/4...etc : will fetch all the specification children until the specified recursion depth.
member.param: Fields to be displayed for specifications
Nested names of specifications to be included in response
Specifications children to be fetch until what depth.
member.response: If the object specifications could be fetched.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.SetSpecifications(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the specifications for an object
member.remarks:
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - The specifications will have "Name,Description" fields.
"*" - The specifications will have "NestedName,Description,Value,DisplayValue,LValue,SIValue,ControlType,Unit,RangeType,Type,TabIndex,PhysUnitLabel,Precision,Length,Count,LinkObject,XValues" fields.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: fields will be filtered out in case they are not a part of the specifications. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Sample request:
PATCH [ { "NestedName":"string", //Required "Value":"string", "SIValue":"double", "LinkObject":{ "UID":"string", "ProjectUID":"string", "OverlayUID":"string" }, "XValues":[{ "Index":"int", "XValue":"string", "SIXValue":"double" }] } ]
member.param: Collection of specifications to be updated.
Fields to be displayed for specifications
member.response: If the the specifications where updated successfully.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.ValidateSpecifications(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
This API will verify the request to update the specifications.(No specification will be updated).
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - The specifications will have "Name,Description" fields.
"*" - The specifications will have "NestedName,Description,Value,DisplayValue,LValue,SIValue,ControlType,Unit,RangeType,Type,TabIndex,PhysUnitLabel,Precision,Length,Count,LinkObject,XValues" fields.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: fields will be filtered out in case they are not a part of the specifications. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Sample request:
POST [ { "NestedName":"string", //Required "Value":"string", "SIValue":"double", "LinkObject":{ "UID":"string", "ProjectUID":"string", "OverlayUID":"string" }, "XValues":[{ "Index":"int", "XValue":"string", "SIXValue":"double" }] } ]
member.param: Collection of specifications to be updated.
Fields to be displayed for specifications
member.response: If the specification update is valid.
If the request is invalid.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetQueryData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the data for a given query
member.param: Export type. At the moment the type 'query2excel' is supported.
member.returns: Query data OR Query data exported file based on the export_type
member.response: If the data was found.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.UpdateObjectProperties(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.remarks:
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - Default set of fields for the object.
"*" - Full set of fields for the object.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields seperated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: Fields will be filtered out in case they are not applicable for the given object type. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Fields supported by Objects based on the object type:
Object Type Default Fields All Fields
CDevice Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Class,XObjExist Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,OwnLabel
Device Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Location,Unit Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,CDevice,BackPointerDocObjs,Documents,Location,Unit,Implementation,BackPointerDevicesWithImplementation,OwnLabel,CObject
Document Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Description2,Description3,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType,BackPointerDocumentsWithOrgDocument,IsDdmDocument,IsDocumentExportable,DocumentExtension,DocumentHasReleaseRevision,OwnLabel
Other Types Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist
Sample request for Device:
PATCH { "Name":"string", "Description":"string", "Label":"string", "CDevice":{ "UID":"string" }, "Owner":{ "UID":"string" } } Sample request for Document:
PATCH { "Name":"string", "Description":"string", "Description2":"string", "Description3":"string", "Label":"string", "CObject":{ "UID":"string" }, "DocumentType":{ "UID":"string" }, "OrgDocument":{ "UID":"string" }, "Owner":{ "UID":"string" } }
member.param: COMOS object with properties to update
Fields to reduce the retrieved properties to
member.response: If the object properties were updated successfully.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.CreateComosObject(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create new object under the existing object
member.remarks:
The fields parameter can have the following valid values:
"" - Default set of fields for the object.
"*" - Full set of fields for the object.
"field1,field2" - Valid set of fields separated by comma for the object. ex. Name,Description,...,etc
Note: Fields will be filtered out in case they are not applicable for the given object type. If all fields specified are invalid, then a BadRequest error will be thrown.
Fields supported by Objects based on the object type:
Object Type Default Fields All Fields
CDevice Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Class,XObjExist Name,FullName,Description,Description2,Description3,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,OwnLabel
Device Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,Location,Unit Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,Class,DetailClass,CDevice,BackPointerDocObjs,Documents,Location,Unit,Implementation,BackPointerDevicesWithImplementation,OwnLabel
Document Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist,OrgDocument,Location,Unit,DocumentType,BackPointerDocumentsWithOrgDocument,IsDdmDocument,IsDocumentExportable,DocumentExtension,DocumentHasReleaseRevision,OwnLabel,CObject
Other Types Name,Description,FullLabel,SystemType,UID,SystemUID Name,FullName,Description,Label,FullLabel,SystemType,Owner,UID,SystemUID,SystemTemporary,XObjExist
Sample request for Device Object:
POST { "Name":"string", "Description":"string", "Label":"string", "CDevice":{ "UID":"string" }, "Owner":{ //Required "UID":"string" } }
Sample request for Document Object: POST { "Name":"string", "Description":"string", "Description2":"string", "Description3":"string", "Label":"string", "CObject":{ "UID":"string" }, "DocumentType":{ "UID":"string" }, "OrgDocument":{ "UID":"string" }, "Owner":{ //Required "UID":"string" } }
member.param: Fields to reduce the retrieved properties to
member.response: If the object was created.
If the request is invalid.
If the parent object could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.DeleteObject(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.response: If the object was deleted successfully.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.BulkUpdate(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.param: Input parameters for updating COMOS object
member.response: If the objects were updated successfully.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.param: COMOS objects with properties or specifications to update
Specifications children to be fetch until what depth.
Fields to return in the response after update
List of specification nested names to return after update
member.response: If properties were updated successfully.
If the request is invalid.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.GetStandardTableValuesForAPI(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.response: If the standard table values could be fetched.
If the resources could not be found.

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiProjectsController.ScriptExecution(System.String,System.String,Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.ScriptExecutionInfo,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Executes a custom script for a given project.

remarks.p: This endpoint allows execution of a script defined in the COMOS system for a specific project.
The script must exist under the customer scripts path ("@20|A80|Z10|").

pre.b: { "SystemFullName": "@20|A80|Z10|ComosObjectName", // Full system path of the COMOS object on which the script is to be executed. Required "ScriptName": "CallScriptName", // Name of the script to execute. Required "Params": [ // Array of parameters to pass to the script. Optional. null, // Null parameter "", // Empty string parameter "string param", // String parameter 1, // Integer\Long parameter 22.5, // Double parameter true, // Boolean parameter (case sensitive) {"UID": "U:8:A3BQHN2KAR:U"}, // Comos Object parameter by UID {"PathFullName": "08UP1§>08UH3"} // Comos Object parameter by PathFullName ] }

section.b: Result property inside the response can be one of the following types

ul.li: String Ex. "This is a response result string"

section.b: Note: Error property inside the response, will be null for successful script execution.
In case of script execution error, Error property inside the response will have a message and the following code types

ul.li: 6: The script was invoked, but resulted in an error thrown by the script or the script with the given name does not exist under the object.
10: The script executed successfully, but the returntype is not supported by this API.

member.returns: Returns the result of the script execution.
member.response: Script executed successfully. Returns .
Invalid request or parameters.
Comos object or project not found.

member.name: T:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiSessionsController
member.summary: Provies session services to public API web client

members.member:
Creates a new session for the current user
POST /public/api/sessions/v1/sessions/actions/login

Remove the session based on session Id
POST /public/api/sessions/v1/sessions/actions/logout

Update the specified session (heartbeat) passed
POST /public/api/sessions/v1/sessions/actions/send_heartbeat

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiUsersController.GetCurrentUserFromUsersService
member.summary: Get the details of the current user
member.response: If the current user could be fetched.
If no user was found.

members.member:
Creates a new user with the given details
The details of the user to be created The database id in case the database configured in the users service is not to be used /// If new user is created. If invalid user details. If user does not have the rights to create user. Newly created user

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiUsersController.AddUserToGroup(Comos.PublicApi.Services.Models.UserIdentifier,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a user to a group
member.param: Name of the group the user will be added to
The database id in case the database configured in the users service is not to be used
The system UID of the project (only needed for roles)
The system UID of the working layer (only needed for roles)
member.response: If the user was added to the group
If one or more of the passed parameters was invalid

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Controllers.PublicApiUsersController.RemoveUserFromGroup(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a user from a group
member.param: Name of the group the user will be removed from
The database id in case the database configured in the users service is not to be used
The system UID of the project (only needed for roles)
The system UID of the working layer (only needed for roles)
member.returns: A string indicating which user was removed from which group

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Helper.FieldsUtility.ExtractFields(System.String,System.String@,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Used to extract fields from fieldExpression into dictionary.
member.param: Entire fieldsExpression apart from the fields present in excludeFieldsExpression
These fields will be excluded from newFieldsExpression

member.name: M:Comos.PublicApi.Services.Helper.FieldsUtility.ExtractFields(System.String)
member.summary: Used to extract fields from fieldExpression into dictionary.
